_comment: MOCK ENDPOINT — replace with a real backend (Firebase / Supabase / Cloudflare Worker) when the iOS app ships.

_endpoints.POST /api/assessments: Submit a new cheesecake assessment (requires auth token)
_endpoints.PATCH /api/assessments/:id/approve: Approve a pending assessment — triggers push notification to other assessors

_pushNotifications.trigger: When a new assessment is submitted, all registered assessors receive a push notification to review and vote.
_pushNotifications.approval_threshold: Both assessors (Marcel + Julian) must approve before the cheesecake is published.
_pushNotifications.deviceTokenEndpoint: POST /api/devices — register an APNs device token
